goal: is_iso_pair[O1, M1](c, f, g) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1](c, f, g)

goal: is_iso_pair[O1, M1](c, f, g) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1](c, f, g)

goal: is_iso_pair[O1, M1](c, f, g) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1](c, f, g)

goal: is_iso_pair[O1, M1](c, f, g) = (c.src(f) = c.dst(g) and c.src(g) = c.dst(f) and c.compose(g, f) = c.identity(c.src(f)) and c.compose(f, g) = c.identity(c.dst(f)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O1, M1](c, f, g)

goal: is_iso_pair[O2, M2](d, ff, gg) = (d.src(ff) = d.dst(gg) and d.src(gg) = d.dst(ff) and d.compose(gg, ff) = d.identity(d.src(ff)) and d.compose(ff, gg) = d.identity(d.dst(ff)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { (x0.src(x1) = x0.dst(x2) and x0.src(x2) = x0.dst(x1) and x0.identity(x0.src(x1)) = x0.compose(x2, x1) and x0.identity(x0.dst(x1)) = x0.compose(x1, x2)) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O2, M2](d, ff, gg)

goal: exists(k0: Iso[O2, M2]) { Iso.new[O2, M2](ftr.dst_cat, ftr.mor_map(e.hom), ftr.mor_map(e.inv)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { Iso.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = is_iso_pair[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[O2, M2](ftr.dst_cat, ftr.mor_map(e.hom), ftr.mor_map(e.inv))

function[T0, T1](x0: lib(category).Category[T0, T1], x1: T1, x2: T1) { not Iso.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or exists(k0: Iso[T0, T1]) { Option.some[Iso[T0, T1]](k0) = Iso.new[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) } }[O2, M2](ftr.dst_cat, ftr.mor_map(e.hom), ftr.mor_map(e.inv))

goal: r.cat = ftr.dst_cat and r.hom = ftr.mor_map(e.hom) and r.inv = ftr.mor_map(e.inv)
exists(k0: Iso[O2, M2]) { k0.cat = ftr.dst_cat and k0.hom = ftr.mor_map(e.hom) and k0.inv = ftr.mor_map(e.inv) }
proof: function(x0: Iso[O2, M2]) { not (x0.cat = ftr.dst_cat and x0.hom = ftr.mor_map(e.hom) and x0.inv = ftr.mor_map(e.inv)) }(r)
